name: Apple Pudding- Lighter
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and shortening.
2. Add the eggs and mix on low speed until well combined.
3. Stir together the flour, nutmeg, and cinnamon; add to egg and sugar mixture. Mix until just blended.
4. Stir in apples and nuts.
5. Dissolve baking soda in hot water, then stir into batter.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured square baking dish.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean. Baking time is approximately 35-45 minutes.
